predicted_A.d=2: 2d = 4 generic; two-branch on Delta_2 = 0 resonance locus

predicted_alpha.comment: ratio of two highest polynomial coefficients in recurrence; family-dependent

predicted_beta.comment: log n correction only on codimension >= 1 loci where alpha_j collide

predicted_gamma_form.structure: formal series tail; closed-form requires Stokes constants (resurgence/monodromy data)
predicted_gamma_form.B-T_alone_predicts: asymptotic existence and shape, not exact values

d=2_branch_mechanism: B-T discriminant trichotomy on Delta_2 = b_1^2 - 4 b_0 b_2 of characteristic polynomial: Delta_2>0 generic, Delta_2<0 oscillatory envelope, Delta_2=0 resonance with beta=1 log correction

agreement_with_sessions.R1.1_finer_split: B-T cannot explain log|j| sub-leading pattern - residue confirmed

residual_to_finer_split: B-T proves leading slope but does NOT determine sub-leading constants at arithmetic loci (j=0 cubics, j=1728, lemniscatic). Finer split requires modular layer: H2 Eisenstein/Chowla-Selberg, H5 X(1) drift, H6 Chowla-Selberg Gamma-products.
